title: Portobello Mushroom Pizza
description: A simple and flavorful Italian-style pizza topped with sautéed portobello mushrooms.
instructions: Roll out the pizza crust to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Spread the umami tomato sauce evenly over the pizza crust, leaving a 1/2 inch (1 cm) border around the edges.
Arrange the sliced portobello mushrooms on top of the sauce.
Sprinkle the shredded molten mozzarella cheese over the mushrooms.
Drizzle the Australian olive oil over the pizza.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove the pizza from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh basil.
Let the pizza cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
